'''Palpatine Essex Yerac''', more commonly known as '''P. Essex Yerac''', was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]].

==Biography==
Yerac fought in the [[Battle of Archais]], probably as a member of [[Midnight Squadron]] from [[Eclipse Team]]. During the battle, with the Rebel units trapped by the [[Assassin's Guild/Legends|Assassin's Guild]] and by Lieutenant Colonel [[Freja Covell]]'s forces, Rebel officer [[Mosara Thiirn]] deserted, which led to an increasingly bad situation for the Rebels. Many Rebels died in the battle because of Thiirn's [[Treason/Legends|treason]]. Yerac's hatred towards Thiirn was well-known; [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] feared for her life should Yerac ever find her.

Yerac also tracked independent [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] through the fog banks of [[Hewl]]'s [[Karap Valley]]. Suddenly, two [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] appeared from the fog itself and it asked the Rebel to keep his distance. Yerac obeyed, but identified the "eyes" as [[Filar-Nitzan/Legends|Filar-Nitzan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Vacander]]. Yerac eventually tried to write a report on Vacander for the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]], but could not find very much information.
